title: Ktice
description: Additional more TiC compatibility for Kubejs.
body:
# Ktice
There is already a good [TiC-compatible mod ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/kubejs-tinkers-construct) here, but maybe it`s not enough.  
Now, you can add Ktice to reslove the problem it is difficult to add recipes to TiC3.
## Supported recipes
    "tconstruct:alloy" 

    "tconstruct:molding_table"

    "tconstruct:molding_basin"

    "tconstruct:melting"

    "tconstruct:entity_melting"

    "tconstruct:severing"
## Example ?
You can visit [the wiki in github](https://github.com/chemiofitor/Ktice/wiki).
